cobblemon.species.skitty-bonded.desc: Adorned with a bow, this Skitty has taken in the love of its beloved trainer. It proudly flaunts the delicate fabric around its neck, showing off the manifestation of the bond between it and its trainer.
cobblemon.species.skitty-mega.desc: Through sheer love and trust between trainer and Pokémon, this Skitty has reached an elevated stage. Not quite evolving, while still becoming more powerful.
